ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sightings" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sighting report */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the UFO was sighted */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the UFO was sighted */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the UFO sighting */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the UFO sighting */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sighting location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sighting location */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the sighting in seconds */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sighting */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the report (e.g., eyewitness, news article) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the sighting has been verified */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the sighting */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the sighting was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sightings_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sightings_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is located */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation of the city (e.g., POINT(40.7128 -74.0060)) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the state is located */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_capital_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the shape */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_colors" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting report */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color reported */,
  "color_intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity of the color (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id", "color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_shapes" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting report */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape reported */,
  "shape_size" TEXT /* Size of the shape (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id", "shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting report */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the report file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the report file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES sightings ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment is public */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the comment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_comments_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES sightings ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_comments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the rating is public */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the rating */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_ratings_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_ratings_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES sightings ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting report */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_tags_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_related" (
  "related_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each related sighting */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting report */,
  "related_sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related sighting report */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relation (e.g., similar, related, duplicate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("related_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_related_related_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_sighting_id") REFERENCES sightings ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_related_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES sightings ("sighting_id")
)
